feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /news/ News: Secret Service advised Trump to not fly Qatari-gifted Air Force One
entry.content: https://thehill.com/homenews/admini stration/5960254-secret-service-adv ised-trump-to-not-fly-qatari-gifted -air-force-one/ The Secret Service advised President Trump not to leave the NATO Summit in Turkey on the newer Qatari-gifted Air Force One, according to a Wednesday report. Sources familiar with the matter said the president flew out of Ankara on the older Air Force One out of an abundance of caution for a potential threat from Iran, although no threats were explicitly identified, The New

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Forgotten Pilots
entry.content: >In 1995, Lou Reed filmed an unaired television pilot called Dirty Boulevard, intended to be a New York centric series that followed him through his favorite diners, delis, coffee shops, bars, and longtime local hot spots across the city. Despite interest in the concept, the pilot was never picked up. https://youtu.be/__MxC5vFQ5I?si=IGC FuWloJFAwrCap

entry.content: >instead of being naturally obsessive or being accidentally cursed to become a Yandere, it was the man's fault and his desire, which turned her into this >no comedic element about a woman being obsessive about a man, it's all just gross, disgusting, psychotic, with lots of gore (also no sex) >it's not even the woman, who is doing this, it's a demonic entity, which has taken possession of her body, but the original constantly tries to break out >it's not even that the woman secretly loves him, bu

entry.title: /o/ Auto: I've just invented a complicated but real world based way to measure how fast a car is
entry.content: I called it length of overtake. It show how long can you stay on the opposite lane before crashing into a car that drives in opposite direction before crashing, assuming you're accelerating and the other car is moving at constant speed. This shows how many cars can you overtake at once.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #2977
entry.content: >Fancy Undergarments Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/83973953/ >Scripts to check image metadata

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Tech Rage Thread
entry.content: >want to replace shitty AMD-branded MediaTek Wifi/BT chip (RZ608) on the motherboard with an Intel one (AX210) >remove motherboard from the case >remove VRM cooling shroud covering the top-left of the motherboard >remove M.2 adapter seated in the PCIe connector >carefully remove the antenna cables from the MediaTek mini board >unscrew the thing, replace with Intel board >now process the preceding list of steps in reverse >turn on computer >install official drivers for both the Wifi and Bluetooth

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >Keep hearing that this is the best Transformers movie >It's slop with shitty Ma…
entry.content: >Keep hearing that this is the best Transformers movie >It's slop with shitty Marvel jokes It's more coherant than the Bay movies, but nowhere near the level of the 86 film. The worldbuilding is done through infodumps, Megatron turns evil because the plot demands it, Chris Hemsworth does a shitty Peter Cullen impression for half of it, Elita-1 is a cunt, and Bumblebee is annoying.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: NEW SPEAKER REVIEW:
entry.content: Behold the ONN XL Party Speaker. This is the $250 model. It's a karaoke beast to say the least. Wal Mart, ya dun good on this one! Bought this for 4th of July thinking I would return it but now I'm in love with it. Heck where do I start with this thing? IT'S SO COOL!! It's fairly rugged molded plastic case but not road worthy gear. Nice texture. Has molded supports for horizontal presentation on either side. The wheels are cheap and plastic, likely to break first. But this thing is light, 40lbs!

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Remakes
entry.content: I realized recently that I prefer to play remakes instead of new games >Don't have to learn a bunch of new game systems >Most new games are trash anyway >Vaguely remember what to do and where to go, no need for guides >Sweet nostalgia Playing remakes is the way to go.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Ol' Reliable
entry.content: What are some weapons, spells, attacks, etc. that you would consider to be the epitome of reliable? I'd say most stock weapons you get in Team Fortress 2 fit this bill, but in particular the default rocket launcher and shotgun are incredibly reliable.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Claude won
entry.content: ChatGPT (OpenAI) Users: ~1.1 billion MAU / 900M weekly active Revenue: ~$25B ARR Valuation: $852B (March 2026 raise) Claude (Anthropic) Users: ~245 million MAU Revenue: ~$47B ARR (overtook OpenAI in April 2026) Valuation: $965B (May 2026 Series H) Note: highest revenue-per-user of any major assistant (~$2.76 ARPU vs ChatGPT's $1.74), 13% paid conversion rate Gemini (Google) Users: ~662M-900M MAU (estimates vary by source) Revenue: not broken out separately, folded into Alphabet Valuation: N/A (p

entry.title: /int/ International: Do you travel in your country? I don't. If I did, it would go exactly like this:…
entry.content: Do you travel in your country? I don't. If I did, it would go exactly like this: >Stay in my hotel room on my phone or laptop most of the time >Only go to tourist trap places, so that I don't feel out of place >Only eat at McDonalds, because there's a 99% chance I don't like the local food >Go home having not spoken to a single person >"Then go with a travel group, bro!" Going with a travel group would go like this: >Introduce myself to the other people in the group >Have nothing else to say bec
